title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic developed CLAFTS, an AI email assistant that helps sales reps draft customer replies in their own voice. Built by Jared Sires using the Claude API and Claude Code, it addresses the administrative burden sales teams face with scattered documentation and late-night email work.
